metadata.name: 这儿没红隐UltraRoomNotHere
metadata.description:
[b]🩸 找不准红隐？让门框告诉你！[/b]
按住[b]丢弃键[/b]后，所有红色门框上会浮现提示： ✦ 红色 [b]X[/b] —— 这不可能开出红隐。 ✦ 青色数字 —— 这扇门后的点位符合红隐的生成规则，数字代表这里可能的点位数目和与点位相连的房间数目。 不再依赖玄学，[b]精准开红隐[/b]，从这儿开始。
────────────────────────
[b]🩸 Can't pin down the Ultra Secret Room? Let the door outlines tell you![/b]
Hold the [b]Drop key[/b], and hints will appear on every red door outline: ✦ Red [b]X[/b] — no Ultra Secret Room can possibly spawn here. ✦ Cyan numbers — the spots behind this door match the Ultra Secret Room spawn rules; the digits show the count of valid spots and how many rooms each spot connects to. No more guesswork. [b]Open the right red door[/b], starting here.
